name: kriar-marketplace
description: KRIAR - Onde a Arte encontra o Futuro

scripts.dev: powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','npm run dev --workspace backend'; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','npm run dev --workspace frontend'"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
